description_long: This object is a small, leafy potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves featuring prominent light-colored veins. The plant has a compact, bushy structure with multiple stems emerging from a central base, giving it a lush and healthy appearance. The leaves are arranged in alternating layers, creating a dense canopy that partially obscures the stems. The foliage is a deep green with subtle gradients and naturalistic shading, suggesting a well-maintained ornamental plant. There is no visible pot or container in the images, as the focus is entirely on the plant itself. The overall look is typical of decorative houseplants often found in urban interiors or office spaces.
description: A compact, bushy potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves and prominent light veins. The plant has a dense, healthy appearance and is suitable for decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, symmetrical spread of the plant's broad leaves and dense foliage.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the left side, with overlapping leaves and visible stem structure.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the right side, showing the layered arrangement of leaves and some leaf undersides.
description_view_3: Rear view with a clear look at the back leaves and the plant's overall vertical structure.
